title: real project feedback improvement
goal: 実案件 live-run で得た学習点をもとに、必要最小限の改善を反映する
scope: artifact or prompt adjustment if needed
constraints: no-op is allowed if no improvement is required
must be justified by session-95 evidence
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/run_session.py: minimal fix only if directly justified by session-95
orchestration/providers/*: minimal fix only if directly justified by session-95
backend/tests/*: regression or evidence coverage only
